herodesc: With decades of experience, we produce premium-quality processed cheese made with care and the highest quality standards, bringing an authentic taste to every table.
aboutP1: Al Safwa Processed Cheese Factory is a fully integrated dairy manufacturer specializing in a wide range of cheese products. Since its establishment in 1984, the factory has become a leading name in the dairy industry by utilizing the latest Italian production technology to manufacture premium processed cheese. Over the years, we have earned a strong reputation for consistently delivering high-quality products.
aboutP2: Our competitive strengths lie in product quality, customer satisfaction, and competitive pricing. These values have enabled us to build lasting relationships of trust with our customers throughout decades of experience.
aboutP3: Today, our products are distributed across the Egyptian market with a strong presence and a distinguished market share while maintaining competitive prices. We also export to several Arab and African markets through a carefully planned sales strategy, maximizing our production capacity and advanced manufacturing capabilities.
certTitle: Because product quality and food safety are our top priorities, our factory has obtained the following internationally recognized certifications:
aboutSlogan: Experience the Highest Quality... and Integrity in Every Deal.
Processed Cheddar desc: Rich and smooth processed Cheddar cheese with a delicious flavor, perfect for sandwiches, burgers, snacks, and everyday meals. Produced according to the highest quality and food safety standards.
Flamenco Cheese desc: Smooth and flavorful Flamenco cheese, ideal for sandwiches, pastries, and family meals. Produced according to the highest quality and food safety standards.
Natural Triangle desc: Creamy natural triangle cheese made from carefully selected ingredients, perfect for breakfast, lunch boxes, and light snacks with fresh bread. Produced according to the highest quality and food safety standards.
Natural Block desc: Creamy natural cheese block with a rich, fresh flavor, ideal for spreading, cooking, or enjoying as a snack. Produced according to the highest quality and food safety standards.
Flamenco Triangle desc: Creamy Flamenco triangle cheese with a rich taste and smooth texture, perfect for breakfast, sandwiches, and snacks. Produced according to the highest quality and food safety standards.
Creamy Block desc: Rich and creamy cheese block with a smooth texture and delicious taste, perfect for sandwiches, recipes, and everyday family meals. Produced according to the highest quality and food safety standards.
footerDesc: Experience the Highest Quality... and Integrity in Every Deal.

productssubtitle: Premium-quality cheese produced according to the highest quality standards.
whyusdesc: At Al Safwa Factory, quality is more than a promise—it's the foundation of everything we do. By selecting the finest ingredients and applying the latest manufacturing technologies, we produce processed cheese with exceptional taste and consistent quality that our customers trust.
quality1desc: We use carefully selected ingredients and follow the highest quality standards to ensure outstanding taste.
quality2desc: Our production relies on the latest Italian manufacturing lines to ensure consistent quality and high efficiency.
quality3desc: All our products are manufactured in accordance with internationally recognized quality and food safety systems.
quality4desc: For more than 40 years, we have earned our customers' trust through consistent quality and commitment.
exportHeroDescription: Bringing the authentic taste of Al Safwa products to customers across the Middle East and Africa.
